title: Morality
content:
One of our recent prospective web development client offers **escort service**. Escort as in "lady" (or in this case also "ladyboy") going out with men, especially farang and some other asian citizens.

On one hand, this could be just another client who might be willing to pay for our product.

On the other hand, the service mentioned above doesn't co-exist with my long standing moral concern at all.

Some might say escort isn't always equal to getting in bed. But if you've seen the photos on the client's current website. You'll be certain that the couple (or more) _will certainly end up in bed_.

Now, money for the company or morality ... tough decision.
